title: Janus Secret Handling and Client Boundary

notes: Use recommendedWorkers only when Janus backend and provider quotas are stable.
Mutation, memory, calendar and filesystem stateful tests remain serial by default.
Provider-parallel tests must use separate chats and testDataNamespace values.
